archetypes.label: Scene
archetypes.description: Open inside a sensory tableau the viewer can picture.

archetypes.label: Contrast
archetypes.description: Snap together two things that should align but don't.

archetypes.label: Counter-claim
archetypes.description: Directly contradict a belief the audience walks in holding.

archetypes.label: Specific result
archetypes.description: Lead with one concrete, surprising outcome (number, measurement, before/after).

archetypes.label: Bold claim
archetypes.description: Stake a strong, falsifiable position in one declarative sentence.
